summary: The 'Run prettier' job failed with exit code 1, indicating that prettier found formatting violations in the repository. The files listed (ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js and CodegenReactiveFunction.ts) contain code that does not match the project's formatting standards.
root_cause: Prettier formatting check failed; one or more files contain code that does not conform to the project's formatting rules.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Exit code 1 from a prettier job indicates formatting violations were detected.
These file paths are listed immediately before the error, indicating prettier was checking them and found formatting issues.
The job is explicitly a prettier formatting check, not a test or compilation step.

suggested_fix: Run prettier locally on the listed files and commit the formatting changes: prettier --write packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
